line_item_fields.name: Job Name (or "Lamex PO" on some receipts)

validation_rules: If totals exist: total ~= subtotal + tax
If line items exist: total ~= sum(line_items.amount)
instructions:
Extraction Instructions:

Vendor: 
- Anchor to business name at top center or top left of the first page. Typical patterns: all-uppercase, bold, largest text. If not clear, use sender label ("From", "Vendor", "Remit To").
Invoice/Receipt Number: 
- Anchor to labels: "Invoice No", "Invoice #", "Receipt No", "Bill No". Accept nearby or following value (alphanumeric). If unlabeled and only one large number near top, use that.
Transaction/Invoice Date: 
- Anchor to labels: "Date", "Invoice Date", "Transaction Date", "Issued". Prefer date nearest to invoice number/location. Normalize to YYYY-MM-DD.
Invoice/Receipt Subtotal: 
- Anchor to "Subtotal" label, picking value directly to its right or below. Remove currency symbols and commas. If omitted, leave blank.
Tax: 
- Anchor to "Tax", "Sales Tax", "VAT" labels. Select nearby numerical value. Remove currency symbols and commas. If omitted, leave blank.
Invoice/Receive Total: 
- Anchor to "Total", "Amount Due", "Invoice Total", "Payment Due" (ignore “Subtotal”). Use last or largest total amount in summary section. Remove currency symbols and commas.
Service Location: 
- Look for "Service Location". If present, extract following text or address. Otherwise, leave blank.
Shipping Address: 
- Anchor to "Ship To", "Shipping Address". Extract following lines until next whitespace or label. If omitted, leave blank.
Billing Address: 
- Anchor to "Bill To", "Billing Address". Extract following lines until next whitespace or label. If omitted, leave blank.
Handwritten Note(s): 
- Detect non-printed/handwritten script regions or OCR artifact recognized as handwriting. If none, leave blank.
Document Name: 
- Use file name of current document, including extension (e.g., "CDII_007861.pdf").
Page Number: 
- Use printed or logical page number. If not printed, use page sequence (e.g., 1 for first PDF page).
Bates Number: 
- Anchor to string/number at top/bottom corners labeled "Bates" or matching known format (e.g., segment like "CDII_007861" at page edge). Otherwise, use file-stamped identifier.

Line Items Table Extraction:
- Identify table below header or summary block, often spanning columns with consistent spacing, or located in the main body.
- Detect columns by anchored headers: use "Description", "Item", "Detail", "Item Description" for Item Description; "Amount", "$", "Charge", "Item Amount" for Item Amount; "Job Name", "PO", "Lamex PO" for Job Name.
- Extract each row: map columns to fields as above. Clean numbers (remove commas/currency signs), pass blanks if fields missing.
- Stop extraction when row pattern breaks or a summary/total appears.
output_columns: Job Name (or "Lamex PO" on some receipts)
